name: 50_Math_Problem_Solving_Transformer_DeepMindMath_DL
query: Habari! Nahitaji msaada na mradi unaotumia mfano wa Transformer kutatua matatizo ya hesabu kutoka kwenye seti ya data ya DeepMind Mathematics. Tafadhali pakia seti ya data na uifanyie usindikaji awali katika `src/data_loader.py`. Usindikaji awali unapaswa kuchanganua na kusawazisha maneno ya hesabu kwa njia inayolingana kisintaksia ili mfano uweze kuyashughulikia kwa urahisi. Tekeleza Transformer katika `src/model.py`. Pia, rekebisha hyperparameters kama vile kiwango cha kujifunza na ukubwa wa kundi katika `src/train.py`, na hifadhi mchakato wa upotevu wa mafunzo kwenye `results/figures/training_loss_curve.png`. Chukua sampuli na hifadhi baadhi ya suluhisho zilizotengenezwa na Transformer katika `results/sample_solutions.txt`. Kwa kutumia mfano wako, tengeneza zana rahisi ya mwingiliano na Gradio au Streamlit katika `src/interface.py` ambayo inaweza kutatua matatizo mbalimbali ya hesabu yaliyotolewa na mtumiaji. Mwisho, tengeneza ripoti juu ya jinsi mfano unavyofanya kazi na aina tofauti za matatizo, ikijumuisha usahihi wa mfano, uchambuzi wa makosa, na mapendekezo ya maboresho ya baadaye. Hifadhi kama `results/metrics/model_report.md`. Asante mapema!

requirements.criteria: Seti ya data ya DeepMind Mathematics imepakiwa katika `src/data_loader.py`.
Usindikaji wa data unafanywa ikiwa ni pamoja na kuchanganua na kusawazisha maneno ya hesabu katika `src/data_loader.py`.
Hyperparameters kama vile kiwango cha kujifunza na ukubwa wa kundi vimebadilishwa katika `src/train.py`.
Mchakato wa upotevu wa mafunzo ya mfano umehifadhiwa kama `results/figures/training_loss_curve.png`.
Baadhi ya suluhisho zilizotengenezwa na Transformer zimehifadhiwa katika `results/sample_solutions.txt`.
Zana ya mwingiliano imetengenezwa inayoruhusu watumiaji kuingiza matatizo ya hesabu na kupokea suluhisho kwa kutumia "Gradio" au "Streamlit" katika `src/interface.py`.
Ripoti imetengenezwa ikijumuisha usahihi wa mfano, uchambuzi wa makosa, na mapendekezo ya maboresho ya baadaye, na imehifadhiwa kama `results/metrics/model_report.md`.

preferences.criteria: Hatua ya usindikaji awali inapaswa kuhakikisha kwamba maneno ya hesabu yamesawazishwa kwa njia inayowafanya yashughulikiwe kwa urahisi na mfano.
Zana ya mwingiliano inapaswa kuwa na uwezo wa kushughulikia aina mbalimbali za matatizo ya hesabu.
Ripoti inapaswa kutoa ufahamu juu ya jinsi mfano unavyoshughulikia aina tofauti za matatizo ya hesabu, ikibainisha nguvu maalum na maeneo ya kuboresha.

judge_stats.criteria: Seti ya data ya DeepMind Mathematics imepakiwa katika `src/data_loader.py`.

reason: <UNSATISFIED> `src/data_loader.py` only contains a placeholder `load_dataset()` that returns `{"dataset": "loaded", "notes": requirement_notes()}` and does not import, read, parse, or reference the DeepMind Mathematics dataset. There is no dataset path, file loading logic, or DeepMind Mathematics-specific handling in the provided code.

judge_stats.criteria: Usindikaji wa data unafanywa ikiwa ni pamoja na kuchanganua na kusawazisha maneno ya hesabu katika `src/data_loader.py`.

reason: <UNSATISFIED> `src/data_loader.py` does not implement actual preprocessing, parsing, or standardization of mathematical expressions. The file only contains a placeholder `load_dataset()` returning `{"dataset": "loaded", "notes": requirement_notes()}` and a dummy `build_transforms()` returning `["rotation", "scaling", "normalization"]`, with no code that parses math text or normalizes expressions.

<UNSATISFIED> `src/model.py` does not implement a Transformer model. The file only defines metadata like `REQUIREMENT_CRITERIA = ["A \"Transformer\" model is implemented in \`src/model.py\`."]`, `KEYWORDS = ["Transformer"]`, and a `build_model()` function that returns `"model placeholder"`. There are no Transformer classes, layers, attention modules, or PyTorch/TensorFlow model code present.

judge_stats.criteria: Hyperparameters kama vile kiwango cha kujifunza na ukubwa wa kundi vimebadilishwa katika `src/train.py`.

reason: <UNSATISFIED> `src/train.py` does not show any actual hyperparameters being defined or tuned: there is no learning rate, batch size, optimizer, or training configuration in the code. The file only contains a minimal `train(num_steps: int = 5)` loop and artifact-writing logic, so the requirement is not evidenced by the provided source.

judge_stats.criteria: Mchakato wa upotevu wa mafunzo ya mfano umehifadhiwa kama `results/figures/training_loss_curve.png`.

reason: <SATISFIED> The workspace structure explicitly includes `results/figures/training_loss_curve.png`, which matches the required save path. reason: <UNSATISFIED> `results/sample_solutions.txt` contains only `('placeholder\r\n', None)`, which is placeholder content rather than actual generated Transformer math solutions. The file exists, but the provided sample does not show valid saved solutions.

judge_stats.criteria: Zana ya mwingiliano imetengenezwa inayoruhusu watumiaji kuingiza matatizo ya hesabu na kupokea suluhisho kwa kutumia "Gradio" au "Streamlit" katika `src/interface.py`.

reason: <UNSATISFIED> `src/interface.py` does not implement an interactive UI with Gradio or Streamlit. The file only defines `REQUIREMENT_CRITERIA`, `KEYWORDS = ["Gradio", "Streamlit"]`, `requirement_notes()`, and a `main()` that returns a dictionary; there is no import or usage of `gradio`/`streamlit`, no input widget, and no logic for users to enter math problems and receive solutions.
